title: io.safe.staking-ui-config
description: Per-chain operator configuration for an independent Safenet Beta staking UI. Holds chain metadata, validators, reward Merkle drop pointers, and feature flags. Contract addresses are kept in a separate io.denna.defi.address-registry file so they can be reused by other tooling (indexers, block explorers, dashboards).

$schema.description: URI or relative path to this schema.

addressRegistry.description: Relative path or URI to the io.denna.defi.address-registry file holding contract addresses. The UI loader reads `staking`, `safeToken`, `sanctionsOracle`, and `merkleDrop` named entries from that file, matched by `chain`.

chains.description: Per-chain operator settings. Each entry matches a `chain` key in the linked address registry.

chain.description: Chain identifier (e.g., ethereum, sepolia). Must match an entry chain in the linked address registry.

deployBlock.description: Block at which the staking contract was deployed. Scopes event log lookups.

rpcUrl.description: Optional default RPC URL. UI prefers VITE_RPC_URL_<chainId> env override.

validators.description: Validators surfaced in the operator's analytics view. The UI also reads isValidator(address) on-chain for write-flow validation, so this list may differ from the on-chain registry.

merkleJsonUrl.description: URL (ideally an IPFS gateway URL) to the static Merkle proofs JSON. Schema: { root: bytes32, claims: { [address]: { cumulativeAmount: string, proof: bytes32[] } } }.

claimWindowSeconds.description: Optional UI-side claim window hint for display only — does not change on-chain behavior.

eip5792Batch.description: Batch approve+stake using EIP-5792 wallet_sendCalls when the wallet supports atomicBatch (e.g. Safe).

geoBlock.description: Enable geo-block hook (operator-provided endpoint or static blocklist).

sanctionsGate.description: Block writes when the configured sanctions oracle returns true for the connected address.
